question: An Agentforce Specialist implements Einstein Sales Emails for a sales team. The team wants to send personalized follow-up emails to leads based on their interactions and data stored in Salesforce. Which grounding technique should the Agentforce Specialist use?
options: Ground with Apex Merge Fields
Ground with Record Merge Fields
Automatic grounding using Draft with Einstein feature
explanation: La funcion 'Draft with Einstein' proporciona grounding automatico usando los datos del registro actual (lead, contacto, oportunidad) para generar emails personalizados sin necesidad de configurar merge fields manualmente. Es el metodo mas directo para Einstein Sales Emails.

question:
An administrator is responsible for ensuring the security and reliability of Universal Containers' (UC) CRM data. UC needs enhanced data protection and up-to-date AI capabilities. UC also needs to include relevant information from a Salesforce record to be merged with the prompt. 
Which feature in the Einstein Trust Layer best supports UC's need?
options: Data masking
Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval
Zero-data retention policy
explanation: Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval en el Einstein Trust Layer permite incluir información de registros de Salesforce en el prompt de forma segura, protegiendo datos sensibles. Data masking oculta datos pero no los incluye dinámicamente; zero-data retention solo controla la retención.

question: Once a data source is chosen for an Agentforce Data Library, what is true about changing that data source later?
options: The Data Retriever can be reconfigured to use a different data source.
The data source can be changed through the Data Cloud settings.
The data source cannot be changed after it is selected.
explanation: No se puede cambiar la fuente de datos después de seleccionar la data source.

question: When is the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol an appropriate communication choice?
options: When agents need to invoke third-party APIs
When agents need to access tools
When agents need to collaborate
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) es apropiado cuando los agentes necesitan colaborar entre si, delegando tareas o compartiendo contexto. Para invocar APIs de terceros se usa MCP, y para acceder a herramientas tambien se usa MCP. A2A es especificamente para colaboracion y comunicacion entre agentes.

question: What is best practice when refining Einstein Agentforce or copilot  custom action instructions?
options: Provide examples of user messages that are expected to trigger the action.
Use consistent introductory phrases and verbs across multiple action instructions.
Specify the persona who will request the action.
explanation: Data Library automatiza la ingestión, indexación de datos y crea un retriever predeterminado para usarlo en prompts y agentes para grounding con información relevante. No hace OCR automático para PDFs en general ni realiza clasificación taxonómica; su función principal es facilitar el grounding.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has registered an external service and created a template-triggered prompt flow that invokes the external service to fetch data from a REST API. UC now needs to make the response data from the external service usable inside a prompt template as a merge field when the template runs. How should UC meet this requirement?
options: Use External Service Record merge fields.
Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use the 'Add Prompt Instructions' flow element.
explanation: Para usar datos de respuesta de un servicio externo como merge fields en un prompt template, se deben usar External Service Record merge fields. Estos permiten referenciar los datos retornados por el servicio externo directamente dentro del workspace del template.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers is working on a prompt template to generate personalized emails for product demonstration requests from customers. It is important for the Al-generated email to adhere strictly to the guidelines, using only associated opportunity information, and to encourage the recipient to take the desired action.
How should the AI Specialist include these instructions on a new line in the prompt template?
options: Surround them with triple quotes (""").
Make sure merged fields are defined.
Use curly brackets {} to encapsulate instructions.
explanation: Configurar una Agentforce Data Library con los documentos de política indexados permite búsquedas semánticas y grounding de respuestas con contenido actualizado. Esto garantiza que el agente devuelva información precisa y que las actualizaciones de Knowledge se reflejen automáticamente.

question: When configuring a prompt template, an Agentforce Specialist previews the results of the prompt template they've written. They see two distinct text outputs: Resolution and Response. What does this mean?
options: It shows the response from the LLM based on the sample record.
It shows the raw prompt sent to the LLM and the model's response separately.
It indicates an error in the template configuration that needs to be resolved.
explanation: Al previsualizar un prompt template, los dos outputs (Resolution y Response) muestran la respuesta del LLM basada en el registro de muestra seleccionado. Resolution es el resultado procesado y Response es la salida directa del modelo.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers (UC) is tasked with creating a new custom prompt template to populate a field with generated output. UC enabled the Einstein Trust Layer to ensure AI Audit data is captured and monitored for adoption and possible enhancements.
Which prompt template type should the AI Specialist use and which consideration should they review?
options: Flex, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Forms is enabled
explanation: Para resolver un campo requerido faltante en el retriever, se debe actualizar el search index para incluir ese campo. El retriever depende de los campos indexados para recuperar datos; sin actualizar el índice, el campo no estará disponible para el retriever.

question: Universal Containers deploys a new Agentforce Service Agent into the company's website but is getting feedback that the Agentforce Service Agent is not providing answers to customer questions that are found in the company's Salesforce Knowledge articles. What is the most likely cause?
options: The Agentforce Service Agent user was not given the Allow View Knowledge permission set.
The Knowledge articles are not published in the correct language.
The Data Library was not connected to the correct Experience Cloud site.
explanation: La causa mas probable es que el usuario del Agentforce Service Agent no tenga el permission set Allow View Knowledge. Sin este permiso, el agente no puede acceder ni recuperar articulos de Knowledge para responder preguntas.

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a Sales Email with a custom prompt template. They need to ground on the following data:
- Opportunity Products
- Events near the customer
- Tone and voice examples
How should the AI Specialist obtain related items?
options: Call a prompt initiated flow to fetch and ground the required data.
Create a flex template that takes the records in question as inputs.
Utilize a standard email template and manually insert the required data fields.
explanation: Llamar a un flow iniciado por prompt permite obtener datos relacionados como Opportunity Products, eventos externos y ejemplos de tono que no están directamente disponibles como merge fields estándar. Un Flex template requiere que los objetos sean inputs directos, no datos relacionados complejos.

question: Where should the Agentforce Specialist go to add/update actions assigned to a copilot?
options: Copilot Actions page, the record page for the copilot action, or the Copilot Action Library tab
Copilot Actions page or Global Actions
Copilot Detail page, Global Actions, or the record page for the copilot action
explanation: Para agregar o actualizar acciones de un copilot, el Agentforce Specialist debe ir a la pagina de Copilot Actions, al record page de la accion especifica, o a la pestana Copilot Action Library. Estas tres ubicaciones permiten gestionar las acciones asignadas al agente.

question: A business stakeholder wants to use AI to generate a summary based on Data Cloud data. Which method(s) should the stakeholder use to access Data Cloud data from Prompt Builder?
options: Accessing data model objects (DMOs) directly in Flex templates, using Data Cloud related lists, and fetching Data Cloud data using prompt-initiated flows
Using Data Cloud related lists and fetching Data Cloud data using prompt-initiated flows
Using only external APIs to import Data Cloud data into Prompt Builder
explanation: Los metodos validos para acceder a datos de Data Cloud desde Prompt Builder son: acceder a DMOs directamente en Flex templates, usar Data Cloud related lists como merge fields, y recuperar datos usando flows iniciados por prompt. Las tres opciones estan disponibles y son complementarias.

question: Universal Containers needs to create Data Cloud reports to understand agent behavior. Which data lake object (DLO) represents an overarching container capturing contiguous interactions with one or more AI agents?
options: AIAgentInteraction
AIAgentInteractionMessage
AIAgentSession
explanation: AIAgentSession es el DLO que representa el contenedor principal que captura interacciones continuas con uno o mas agentes de IA. AIAgentInteraction captura interacciones individuales y AIAgentInteractionMessage captura mensajes especificos dentro de una interaccion.

question: Universal Containers has a custom Agent action calling a flow to retrieve the real-time status of an order from the order fulfillment system. What should the Agentforce Specialist consider about the running user's data access?
options: The flow must have the 'with sharing' permission selected in the advanced settings for the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings to be respected.

The custom action adheres to the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings configured in the flow. The Agent will always run flows in system mode so the running user's data access will not affect the data returned.
explanation: Los agentes siempre ejecutan flows en system mode, lo que significa que los permisos, FLS y configuracion de sharing del flow se aplican independientemente del usuario en ejecucion. El acceso a datos del usuario no afecta los datos retornados cuando el agente invoca un flow.

question: Universal Containers plans to enhance the customer support team's productivity using AI. Which specific use case necessitates the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Creating a draft of a support bulletin post for new product patches.
Estimating support ticket volume based on historical data and seasonal trends.
Creating an AI-generated customer support agent performance score.
explanation: Prompt Builder es necesario para generar borradores de contenido con AI.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to ensure the effectiveness, reliability, and trust of its agents prior to deploying them in production. UC would like to efficiently test a large and repeatable number of utterances. What should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Deploy the agent in a QA sandbox environment and review the Utterance Analysis reports.
Create a CSV file with UC's test cases in Agentforce Testing Center using the testing template.
Leverage the Agent Large Language Model (LLM) UI and test with different utterances.
explanation: Use CSV de casos de prueba en Agentforce Testing Center para pruebas repetibles.

question: An administrator wants to check the response of the Flex prompt template they've built, but the preview button is greyed out. What is the reason for this?
options: The prompt has not been saved and activated.
The records related to the prompt have not been selected.
A merge field has not been inserted in the prompt.
explanation: Si el botón de preview está gris, el template no se ha guardado o activado. Debe guardarse y activarse para que la vista previa funcione.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is Implementing Service AI Grounding to enhance its customer service operations. UC wants to ensure that its AI generated responses are grounded in the most relevant data sources. The team needs to configure the system to include all supported objects for grounding.
Which objects should UC select to configure Service AI Grounding?
options: Case, Knowledge, and Case Notes
Case and Knowledge
Case, Case Emails, and Knowledge
explanation: Record Snapshots filtra automáticamente los campos vacíos y solo incluye campos con valores en el grounding, lo que reduce el ruido y mejora la relevancia de las respuestas. Activities como tareas y eventos sí pueden estar incluidos, y el email no se excluye por defecto.

question: A Universal Containers administrator is setting up Einstein Data Libraries. After creating a new library, the administrator notices that only the file upload option is available; there is no option to configure the library using a Salesforce Knowledge base. What is the most likely cause of this issue?
options: Salesforce Knowledge is not enabled in the organization; without Salesforce Knowledge enabled, the Knowledge-based data source option will not be available in Einstein Data Libraries.
The current Salesforce org lacks the necessary Einstein for Service permissions that support the Knowledge-based Data Library option, so only the file upload option is presented.
The administrator is not using Lightning Experience, which is required to display all data source options, including the Knowledge base option, when configuring Einstein Data Libraries.
explanation: Si Knowledge no está habilitado, no aparece la opción de Knowledge-based source.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) plans to send one of three different emails to its customers based on the customer's lifetime value score and their market segment.
Considering that UC are required to explain why an e-mail was selected, which AI model should UC use to achieve this?
options: Predictive model and generative model
Generative model
Predictive model
explanation: Un modelo predictivo es el adecuado para seleccionar uno de tres emails basándose en el lifetime value y segmento de mercado, y puede explicar la razón de la selección mediante sus features de predicción. Un modelo generativo crea contenido nuevo pero no puede explicar fácilmente por qué seleccionó una opción entre varias predefinidas.

question:
The AI Specialist of Northern Trail Outfitters reviewed the organization's data masking settings within the Configure Data Masking menu within Setup. Upon assessing all of the fields, a few additional fields were deemed sensitive and have been masked within Einstein's Trust Layer.
Which steps should the AI Specialist take upon modifying the masked fields?
options: Turn off the Einstein Trust Layer and turn it on again.
Test and confirm that the responses generated from prompts that utilize the data and masked data do not adversely affect the quality of the generated response
Turn on Einstein Feedback so that end users can report if there are any negative side effects on AI features.
explanation: Después de modificar los campos enmascarados, se deben probar los prompts que utilizan esos datos para confirmar que el enmascaramiento no afecta negativamente la calidad de las respuestas generadas. Reiniciar el Trust Layer no tiene efecto y habilitar Einstein Feedback no valida directamente el impacto del enmascaramiento.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to ground a new prompt template with the User related list.
What should the AI Specialist consider?
options: The User related list should have View All access.
The User related list needs to be included on the record page.
The User related list is not supported in prompt templates.
explanation: La función principal del reasoning engine es identificar los topics y actions correctos para responder a las utterances del usuario, no generar respuestas directamente. Es el orquestador que decide qué capacidades del agente activar en cada interacción.

question: Which scenario best illustrates the use of Model Context Protocol (MCP) in an enterprise AI deployment?
options: A legal assistant agent using MCP to dynamically find a document classification API to analyze case files
A customer service agent engaging another agent in real-time conversation to resolve tickets
A sales agent discovering other agents' capabilities using Agent Cards
explanation: MCP se ilustra mejor con un agente que lo usa para descubrir y conectarse dinamicamente a herramientas y APIs externas, como una API de clasificacion de documentos. La opcion B describe A2A y la opcion C describe el uso de Agent Cards, que son parte del protocolo A2A para descubrimiento de capacidades entre agentes.

question: What is the primary function of the planner service in the Agent system?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Offering real-time language translation during conversations
Identifying copilot actions to respond to user utterances
explanation: La funcion principal del planner service es identificar las acciones del copilot/agente mas apropiadas para responder a las utterances del usuario. Analiza la solicitud, selecciona el topic correcto y determina que acciones ejecutar y en que orden.

question: What is the primary function of the planner service in the Einstein Agentforce or copilot  system?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Offering real-time language translation during conversations
Identifying Agentforce or copilot  actions to respond to user utterances
explanation: Einstein Trust Layer actúa como intermediario seguro entre Salesforce y el LLM, enmascarando datos sensibles antes de enviar el prompt y desenmascando los datos en la respuesta. Esta arquitectura garantiza que información confidencial nunca sea enviada directamente al modelo externo.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts (CCR) wants to configure its agent so that booking actions are only available when a customer's membership tier is 'Premium' or 'Elite'. This business rule must be enforced deterministically. What should CCR implement?
options: Set up custom validation rules on the underlying booking objects to prevent non-eligible customers from completing bookings.
Configure topic instructions that clearly state booking actions should only be used for Premium or Elite customers and include examples.
Create a context variable mapped to the customer's membership tier field, then add a conditional filter on MembershipTier.
explanation: Para aplicar reglas de negocio de forma determinista, se debe crear una context variable mapeada al campo de nivel de membresia y agregar un filtro condicional en la accion de booking. Depender de las topic instructions no es deterministico ya que el LLM puede no seguirlas consistentemente.

question: Universal Containers has a strict change management process that requires all possible configuration to be completed in a sandbox which will be deployed to production. The Agentforce Specialist is tasked with setting up Work Summaries for Enhanced Messaging. Einstein Generative AI is already enabled in production. Which configuration steps should the Agentforce Specialist take in the sandbox that can be deployed to production?
options: Create custom fields to store Issue, Resolution, and Summary; create a Quick Action that updates these fields; add the Wrap Up component to the Messaging Session record page layout; and create Permission Set Assignments for the intended Agents.

From the Einstein setup menu, select Turn on Einstein; create custom fields to store Issue, Resolution, and Summary; create a Quick Action that updates these fields; and add the wrap up component to the Messaging session record page layout.
Create custom fields to store Issue, Resolution, and Summary; create a Quick Action that updates these fields; and add the Wrap Up component to the Messaging session record page layout.
explanation: Los pasos configurables en sandbox para Work Summaries son: crear campos personalizados para Issue, Resolution y Summary; crear una Quick Action que actualice esos campos; y agregar el componente Wrap Up al page layout de Messaging Session. Permission Set Assignments y la activacion de Einstein no se pueden desplegar via change set.

question: A service manager wants to use Salesforce Prompt Builder to help agents summarize customer case notes after a support call. The summary should: capture the customer's issue, troubleshooting steps taken, and next actions; be no longer than five sentences; use plain language; and if no next action is identified, explicitly state 'No next action required.' Which prompt template follows Salesforce prompt design best practices?
options: Role: You are an experienced support agent. Task: Summarize the case notes. Context: Include customer issue, troubleshooting steps, and next actions. Constraints: Limit to 5 sentences, use plain language, and if no next action is found, state 'No next action required.' Format: Use numbered sentences for clarity.

Role: You are a support agent writing a case summary. Task: Provide a professional summary. Context: Include customer issue, steps taken, and next actions if available. Constraints: No strict sentence limit, but use plain language. If no next action is found, leave it out. Format: Use paragraphs.

Role: You are a case documentation assistant. Task: Write a summary of the support call. Context: Always describe the customer issue, troubleshooting, and resolution details. Constraints: The summary should be comprehensive and professional, but there is no limit on length or language style.
explanation: La opcion A sigue las mejores practicas de diseno de prompts de Salesforce: define claramente el rol, la tarea, el contexto, las restricciones especificas (limite de oraciones, lenguaje sencillo, manejo del caso sin accion), y el formato. Las otras opciones tienen restricciones vagas o incompletas que no garantizan la calidad del output.

question: Universal Containers has multiple Salesforce orgs, each with a unique customer service agent where a verification agent must pass customer identity data to downstream agents handling account modifications. The customer ID must remain secure and persistent across agent handoffs without exposure to LLM modification. What is the most appropriate configuration?
options: Implement a custom object to temporarily store verification status and have each agent query it via SOQL actions during execution.
Store customer identity information in conversation variables created by the first agent and have other agents read those same conversation variables.
Use the Agent API to start the downstream agent's session and pass the verified customer ID as a read-only context variable, ensuring security and preventing LLM alteration.
explanation: Para transferir datos de identidad de forma segura entre agentes en distintos orgs, la solucion correcta es usar el Agent API para iniciar la sesion del agente downstream y pasar el customer ID verificado como una context variable de solo lectura. Esto garantiza seguridad, persistencia y previene que el LLM modifique datos criticos de identidad.

question: A Salesforce Administrator wants to generate personalized, targeted emails that incorporate customer interaction data. The admin wants to leverage large language models (LLMs) to write the emails, and wants to reuse templates for different products and customers. Which solution approach should the admin leverage?
options: Create a Sales Email prompt template type.
Use Sales Email standard templates.
Create a Field Generation prompt template type.
explanation: Crear plantilla de prompt de Sales Email reutilizable para diferentes clientes.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) recently rolled out Einstein Generative Al capabilities and has created a custom prompt to summarize case records. Users have reported that the case summaries generated are not returning the appropriate information.
What is a possible explanation for the poor prompt performance?
options: The data being used for grounding Is incorrect or incomplete.
The prompt template version is incompatible with the chosen LLM.
The Einstein Trust Layer is incorrectly configured.
explanation: Tanto change sets como Salesforce CLI/Metadata API pueden utilizarse para desplegar flows, Apex y todos los metadatos relacionados con el agente de forma completa y consistente. No es necesario recrear manualmente los componentes del agente en producción ni limitarse a un solo método de despliegue.

question: A data science team has trained an XGBoost classification model for product recommendations on Databricks. The Agentforce Specialist is tasked with bringing inferences for product recommendations from this model into Data Cloud as a stand-alone DMO. How should the Agentforce Specialist set this up?
options: Create the serving endpoint in Databricks, then configure the model using Model Builder.
Create the serving endpoint in Einstein Studio, then configure the model using Model Builder.
Create the serving endpoint in Databricks, then configure the model using a Python SDK connector.
explanation: Para integrar un modelo de Databricks en Data Cloud, primero se debe crear el serving endpoint en Databricks donde esta hospedado el modelo, y luego configurar la conexion al modelo en Salesforce usando Model Builder. Einstein Studio no puede crear endpoints en plataformas externas.

question: How does the Einstein Trust Layer ensure that sensitive data is protected while generating useful and meaningful responses?
options: Masked data will be de-masked during response journey.
Masked data will be de-masked during request journey.
Responses that do not meet the relevance threshold will be automatically rejected.
explanation: En el Einstein Trust Layer, los datos enmascarados se enmascaran durante el viaje de request (antes de enviar al LLM) y se desenmascaran durante el viaje de response (al devolver la respuesta al usuario). Esto protege los datos sensibles mientras mantiene la utilidad de las respuestas generadas.

question: Which use case is best supported by Salesforce Einstein Agentforce or copilot 's capabilities?
options: Bring together a conversational interface for interacting with AI for all Salesforce users, such as developers and ecommerce retailers.
Enable Salesforce admin users to create and train custom large language models (LLMs) using CRM data.
Enable data scientists to train predictive AI models with historical CRM data using built-in machine learning capabilities.
explanation: Messaging Session es el objeto que almacena la transcripción completa de conversaciones entre clientes y agentes de mensajería. Case almacena la solicitud de soporte y Messaging End User identifica al cliente, pero la transcripción vive en Messaging Session.

question: A Service Agent at Universal Containers is designed to help customers resolve issues by searching against knowledge articles. Knowledge articles have PDF attachments that add critical details. UC reports that the agent provides excellent summaries of the knowledge articles, but seems completely unaware of the PDF attachments. How should an Agentforce Specialist configure the Data Cloud search index to include the content of these attached files?
options: Increase article chunk size and token limits for Knowledge indexing so larger contexts capture attachment references.
Enable 'Include Related Attachments' for Knowledge--kav and map the ContentDocumentLink unstructured data model object (UDMO).
Use Data Cloud's 'Include Attachments' option and select the ContentDocumentVersion unstructured data model object (UDMO).
explanation: Para incluir el contenido de archivos PDF adjuntos a articulos de Knowledge en el search index, se debe usar la opcion 'Include Attachments' de Data Cloud y seleccionar el UDMO ContentDocumentVersion, que representa las versiones de documentos adjuntos y permite indexar su contenido para busqueda semantica.

question: Universal Containers wants to leverage the Record Snapshots grounding feature in a prompt template. What preparations are required?
options: Configure page layout of the master record type.
Create a field set for all the fields to be grounded.
Enable and configure dynamic form for the object.
explanation: Record Snapshots utiliza field sets para determinar qué campos se incluyen para grounding. Configurar field set es el paso esencial para que la información se rastree correctamente.

question: A support team handles a high volume of chat interactions and needs a solution to provide quick, relevant responses to customer inquiries. Responses must be grounded in the organization's knowledge base. Which feature should the support team use?
options: Einstein Knowledge Recommendations
Einstein Service Replies
Einstein Reply Recommendations
explanation: Einstein Service Replies es la función de respuesta IA para chats de servicio, basada en Knowledge. Permite respuestas rápidas y alineadas con la base de conocimiento de la empresa.

question:
Universal Containers is using Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for Sales to find similar opportunities to help close deals faster. The team wants to understand the criteria used by the Agentforce or copilot  to match opportunities. 
What is one criteria that Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for Sales uses to match similar opportunities?
options: Matched opportunities are limited to the same account.
Matched opportunities were created in the last 12 months.
Matched opportunities have a status of Closed Won from last 12 months.
explanation: Action Instructions son la configuración más crítica para que el agente identifique correctamente cuándo ejecutar cada acción. El nombre y los inputs también importan, pero las instrucciones definen el comportamiento y la lógica de selección de la acción por parte del LLM.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is creating a custom action for Agentforce. Which setting should the Agentforce Specialist test and iterate on to ensure the action performs as expected?
options: Action Instructions
Action Name
Action Input
explanation: Action Instructions son la configuración clave para iterar y validar el comportamiento de una acción. Ajustarlas permite mejorar la precisión del flow y los outcomes.

question: Universal Containers is building a digital shopping assistant that needs to dynamically generate product recommendations using information from the company's external product recommendation predictive model through APIs. Which Agentforce capability should make it easier for the agent to consume the external product recommendation tool?
options: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Hugging Face
Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol
explanation: Model Context Protocol (MCP) es la capacidad de Agentforce que permite al agente descubrir y consumir dinamicamente herramientas y APIs externas, como un modelo predictivo de recomendaciones de productos. MCP facilita la integracion con herramientas externas de forma estandarizada sin necesidad de codificacion custom.

question: What is the primary function of the reasoning engine in Agentforce?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Identifying agent topics and actions to respond to user utterances
Offering real-time natural language responses during conversations
explanation: El reasoning engine identifica topics y acciones adecuados para una utterance.

question: What is the role of the large language model (LLM) in understanding intent and executing an Agent Action?
options: Determine a user's topic access and sort actions by priority to be executed
Identify the best matching topic and actions and correct order of execution
Find similar requested topics and provide the actions that need to be executed
explanation: El LLM identifica el topic y la acción correcta en base a la intención del usuario, y ordena los pasos para ejecutar la respuesta adecuada.

question: Cloud Kicks (CK) is launching a new partner portal on Experience Cloud. CK wants to provide partners with an agent that can answer questions about product specifications from the knowledge base and allow them to submit a new Lead. The agent must be accessible only to authenticated partner users on the portal. Which agent type is required to meet this scenario?
options: Sales Agent
Commerce Agent
Service Agent
explanation: Un Service Agent es el tipo correcto para este escenario: responder preguntas basadas en Knowledge y permitir enviar Leads en un portal de Experience Cloud para usuarios autenticados. Service Agent soporta integracion con Knowledge y acciones de CRM como creacion de Leads.

question: Universal Containers (UC) would like to implement Sales Development Representative (SDR) Agent. Which channel consideration should UC be aware of while implementing it?
options: SDR Agent can be deployed in any Salesforce channel including Email and Chat.
SDR Agent must be deployed in Email channel only.
SDR Agent must be deployed in Messaging channel.
explanation: El SDR Agent debe desplegarse en el canal de Messaging. Esta es una restriccion de canal importante a tener en cuenta durante la implementacion del agente SDR en Salesforce.

question: What is the main purpose of Prompt Builder?
options: A tool for developers to use in Visual Studio Code that creates prompts for Apex programming, assisting developers in writing code more efficiently.
A tool that enables companies to create reusable prompts for large language models (LLMs), bringing generative AI responses to their flow of work
A tool within Salesforce offering real-time Al-powered suggestions and guidance to users, Improving productivity and decision-making.
explanation: La causa habitual de que los reps no puedan encontrar el SDR Agent es la falta del permission set Use SDR Agent. Este permission set es el que otorga acceso y visibilidad al agente SDR; sin él, el agente simplemente no aparece para los usuarios.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to use Flow to bring data from unified Data Cloud objects to prompt templates. Which type of flow should UC use?
options: Template-triggered prompt flow
Data Cloud-triggered flow
Unified-object linking flow
explanation: Use un template-triggered prompt flow para llevar datos a plantillas de prompts.

question: Universal Containers needs to bring individual customer warranties from an external system into Data Cloud. They want Agentforce to return warranty-related responses only for accounts whose warranty status is active. Which search approach should the Agentforce Specialist configure?
options: Depend on Agentforce instructions to enforce warranty constraints and include only WarrantyStatus = Active results.
Store the account's warranty status in an Agentforce custom variable to dynamically filter warranties during retrieval.
Use Hybrid Search and apply pre-filtering in a new custom retriever for matching accounts where the WarrantyStatus = Active field.
explanation: Usar Hybrid Search con pre-filtering en un retriever personalizado para WarrantyStatus = Active garantiza que solo se recuperen garantias activas de forma determinista. Depender de instrucciones del agente no es suficientemente confiable para filtros de negocio criticos.

question: Universal Containers (UC) recently rolled out Einstein Generative AI capabilities and has created a custom prompt to summarize case records. Users have reported that the case summaries generated are not returning the appropriate information. What is the most likely root cause?
options: The LLM model selected is not compatible with case summarization.
The prompt template has not been activated in production.
The data being used for grounding is incorrect or incomplete.
explanation: Cuando los resumenes generados no devuelven la informacion apropiada, la causa mas probable es que los datos de grounding sean incorrectos o incompletos. El LLM genera respuestas basadas en el contexto proporcionado; si el grounding falla, las respuestas no seran precisas.

question: Universal Containers has a requirement to provide a sales summary for its sales reps who are using Employee Agents, but they are not happy with the default answer. Which best practice should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Create a Record Summary custom prompt template.
Create a Knowledge Answer custom prompt template.
Update the standard record summary action.
explanation: La mejor practica cuando el resumen estandar no cumple los requisitos es crear un Record Summary prompt template personalizado. Esto permite controlar completamente el contenido, formato y grounding del resumen sin modificar el comportamiento estandar del sistema.

question: How does Agentforce select the correct action to resolve a user's request?
options: Each topic contains a list of the matching action's user utterances so that the agent can map the user request to the right topic and action.
The large language model (LLM) selects the right topic and action, if they exist. If there are no matches, the LLM attempts to answer the user's request.
The reasoning engine identifies the agent action to be executed by its name and action input instructions.
explanation: Agentforce selecciona la accion correcta mediante el LLM, que evalua el topic y la accion mas apropiados basandose en las instrucciones configuradas. Si no encuentra coincidencias, el LLM intenta responder directamente la solicitud del usuario usando su conocimiento general.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has implemented Generative AI within Salesforce to enable summarization of a custom object called Guest. Users have reported mismatches in the generated information. In refining its prompt design strategy, which key practices should UC prioritize?
options: Create concise, clear, and consistent prompt templates with effective grounding, contextual role-playing, clear instructions, and iterative feedback.
Enable prompt test mode, allocate different prompt variations to a subset of users for evaluation, and standardize the most effective model based on performance feedback.
Submit a prompt review case to Salesforce and conduct thorough testing in the playground to refine outputs until they meet user expectations.
explanation: Use prompts concisos, claros y grounding fuertes con feedback iterativo.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to improve the productivity of its sales team with generative AI technology. However, UC is concerned that public AI virtual assistants lack adequate company data to generate useful responses. Which solution should UC consider?
options: Fine-tune the Einstein AI model with CRM data.
Build AI model with Einstein discovery and deploy to sales users.
Enable Agentforce and deploy to sales users.
explanation: Habilitar Agentforce y desplegarlo a los usuarios de ventas es la solucion correcta, ya que Agentforce puede acceder y usar los datos del CRM de Salesforce como grounding para generar respuestas utiles y contextualizadas. No requiere fine-tuning ni construir modelos desde cero.

question: What is the main benefit of using a Knowledge article in an Agentforce Data Library?
options: It provides a structured, searchable repository of approved documents so the agent can retrieve reliable information for each inquiry.
Only the retriever for Knowledge articles allows agents to access Knowledge from both inside the platform and on a customer's website.
The retriever for Knowledge articles has better accuracy and performance than the default retriever.
explanation: Knowledge articles ofrecen repositorio estructurado y confiable para retrieval.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has registered an external service in Salesforce. UC wants to use the response from the external service as a merge field in a prompt template. Which element in the template-triggered prompt flow should UC use to make this data available as a merge field?
options: Use External Service Record merge fields.
Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use the 'Add Prompt Instructions' flow element.
explanation: Los External Service Record merge fields permiten referenciar directamente los datos retornados por servicios externos registrados en Salesforce dentro de un prompt template. Es el mecanismo nativo para hacer que datos de servicios externos esten disponibles como merge fields.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team to use AI to suggest recommended products from its catalog. Which type of prompt template should UC use?
options: Record summary prompt template.
Email generation prompt template.
Flex prompt template.
explanation: Un Flex Template es el tipo correcto para sugerir productos recomendados ya que permite combinar datos de multiples objetos (catalogo de productos, historial del cliente) como inputs independientes para generar recomendaciones personalizadas.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is setting up a new org and needs to ensure that users can create and execute prompt templates. The specialist is unsure which roles are necessary. Which permission sets should be assigned?
options: Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Data Cloud Admin for executing templates.
Data Cloud Admin for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
explanation: Prompt Template Manager crea y administra plantillas; Prompt Template User permite ejecutar las plantillas. Asignar ambos es la práctica de permisos correcta para creación y ejecución.

question: Universal Containers wants its AI agent to answer customer questions with precise and up-to-date information. How does an Agentforce Data Library simplify and enable this?
options: It automates the ingestion and optical character recognition (OCR) processing of any PDF and indexes them to enable SQL query retrieval.
It automates the ingestion, indexing of data, and creates a default retriever to be used in prompts and agents for grounding with relevant information.
It automates the ingestion, taxonomical classification and storage of knowledge for keyword search retrieval.
explanation: Data Library automatiza ingestión, indexación y crea retriever para grounding.

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a prompt template to fill a custom field named Latest Opportunities Summary on the Account object with information from the three most recently opened opportunities.
How should the AI Specialist gather the necessary data for the prompt template?
options: Create a flow to retrieve the opportunity information.
Select the Account Opportunity object as a resource when creating the prompt template.
Select the latest Opportunities related list as a merge field.
explanation: Para obtener datos de las tres oportunidades más recientes de una cuenta en un prompt template, crear un flow es la técnica correcta, ya que permite recuperar registros relacionados con lógica de ordenamiento y límites. Los merge fields estándar no permiten este nivel de control sobre registros relacionados.

question: Universal Containers (UC) users are complaining that agent answers are not satisfactory. The agent is using PDF files as a knowledge source. How should UC troubleshoot this issue?
options: Verify the retriever's filter criteria and data source connection.
Check that the agent has the PDF file field permission access for the data library.
Analyze the data mapping between source fields and Data Cloud object fields.
explanation: Cuando el agente usa PDFs, las respuestas dependen del mapeo de campos de Data Cloud. Revisar mapping y data source es clave para mejorar la precisión antes de cambiar modelos.
